instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Saturday football
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Some of us are playing football in the park on Saturday morning. [1]Would you like to join us?[/1]||[2]Can you bring an extra ball?[/2] We only have one at the moment.||[3]What time should we start?[/3]||[4]Do you think we should invite some students from another class?[/4]||Let me know||Adam

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Adam,||Thanks for inviting me. [1]Yes, I’d like to join you because I haven’t played football for a few weeks and it sounds fun.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t bring an extra ball because mine is broken. Maybe someone else has one.[/2]||[3]I suggest starting at ten o’clock because it won’t be too early, but we’ll still have most of the morning to play.[/3]||[4]I don’t think we should invite students from another class because there may be too many people.[/4]||See you on Saturday,||Luke
